Safety Third

Help Make Safety Third Great!

Do you have an idea for an activity, workshop, or session that could create opportunities for Burn organizers and volunteers to learn / share / network etc? If so, click the link below and fill out the form to send us your proposal:

S3 2026 Session Proposal Form

Session proposal deadline is April 10th end of day.

You must also also register as a participant or you will not be able to come.

If you have any questions you can reach out to us at safetythird@fireflyartscollective.org
